mapper.sql: id, title, difficulty, board_size, board_json, side_to_move, goal, max_user_moves, solution_moves_json, hint_text, status
mapper.select: SELECT FROM daily_puzzle WHERE id = #{id} LIMIT 1
SELECT id FROM daily_puzzle WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY id ASC LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_puzzle (title, difficulty, board_size, board_json, side_to_move, goal, max_user_moves, solution_moves_json, hint_text, status) VALUES (#{title}, #{difficulty}, #{boardSize}, #{boardJson}, #{sideToMove}, #{goal}, #{maxUserMoves,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{solutionMovesJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, #{hintText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{status})
mapper.update: UPDATE daily_puzzle SET title = #{title}, difficulty = #{difficulty}, board_size = #{boardSize}, board_json = #{boardJson}, side_to_move = #{sideToMove}, goal = #{goal}, max_user_moves = #{maxUserMoves,jdbcType=INTEGER}, solution_moves_json = #{solutionMovesJson,jdbcType=LONGVARCHAR}, hint_text = #{hintText,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM daily_puzzle ORDER BY id DESC LIMIT #{limit}
